module_sme_rollup.name: Project Setup & Structure
module_sme_rollup.description: Define, organize, and template projects with clear scope, hierarchy, and reusable frameworks.

statements.text: Create project master records with scope, status lifecycle, and customer/contract linkage.
statements.rationale: Foundation for all project tracking and traceability.

statements.text: Organize work into phases, milestones, tasks, and subtasks with dependencies and drag-and-drop reordering.
statements.rationale: Enables hierarchical work breakdown and flexible scheduling.

statements.text: Save and apply reusable project templates with auto-rescheduled tasks and dependency preservation.
statements.rationale: Accelerates repeatable engagements and standardizes workflows.

statements.text: Apply custom fields, tags, and classification to filter and organize projects by business criteria.
statements.rationale: Supports portfolio management and stakeholder reporting.

module_sme_rollup.name: Execution & Collaboration
module_sme_rollup.description: Assign work, track progress, and enable team communication across tasks and deliverables.

statements.text: Assign tasks with priority, deadline, assignee, and status workflow with real-time progress tracking.
statements.rationale: Ensures clear ownership and visibility of work completion.

statements.text: Visualize project timeline with interactive Gantt chart, critical path, and baseline variance overlay.
statements.rationale: Identifies schedule risks and enables proactive schedule management.

statements.text: Organize work on Kanban board with configurable columns, WIP limits, swimlanes, and sprint planning.
statements.rationale: Supports agile and iterative delivery with visual workflow control.

statements.text: Store documents, maintain version history, enable threaded comments, and notify on updates and mentions.
statements.rationale: Centralizes project knowledge and enables asynchronous collaboration.

statements.text: Send email and in-app notifications for task assignments, deadline reminders, and pending approvals.
statements.rationale: Keeps team aligned and prevents missed deadlines.

statements.text: Register risks and issues with probability, impact, owner, mitigation plan, and escalation alerts.
statements.rationale: Proactively manages project threats and resolution tracking.

module_sme_rollup.name: Resource & Capacity Management
module_sme_rollup.description: Allocate team members, track utilization, and balance workload across projects.

statements.text: Assign team members to projects and tasks with estimated effort hours and skill categorization.
statements.rationale: Enables targeted resource allocation and capacity planning.

statements.text: View resource availability across all projects, excluding leave and public holidays automatically.
statements.rationale: Prevents over-allocation and identifies capacity gaps.

statements.text: Visualize over-allocated and under-allocated resources on capacity heatmap with drag-and-drop rebalancing.
statements.rationale: Optimizes workload distribution and resource utilization.

statements.text: Report utilization rate as billable or assigned hours divided by available hours by person and period.
statements.rationale: Measures resource productivity and identifies bench time.

module_sme_rollup.name: Time, Cost & Billing
module_sme_rollup.description: Track labor and expenses, manage budgets, and generate accurate client invoices.

statements.text: Log hours against projects and tasks with billable classification and real-time timer or weekly grid view.
statements.rationale: Captures labor effort for cost allocation and billing.

statements.text: Route timesheets through approval workflow with submit, approve, reject, and lock-after-approval controls.
statements.rationale: Ensures accuracy and prevents unauthorized timesheet edits.

statements.text: Define project budgets by labor, materials, travel, and subcontractor; track actual spend in real time.
statements.rationale: Enables cost control and variance monitoring.

statements.text: Calculate labor costs automatically from timesheets using role-based or employee-specific rate cards.
statements.rationale: Automates cost allocation and reduces manual entry errors.

statements.text: Alert when actual spend exceeds configurable budget threshold; forecast cost-to-complete and EAC.
statements.rationale: Enables early intervention on budget overruns.

statements.text: Capture and approve expenses by category with receipt upload; post to payroll or accounts payable.
statements.rationale: Tracks non-labor costs and integrates with financial systems.

statements.text: Generate invoices from time-and-materials, fixed-price, milestone, or progress-based billing methods.
statements.rationale: Supports diverse billing models and revenue recognition.

statements.text: Consolidate multiple projects into single invoice per customer; post to accounts receivable and track payment.
statements.rationale: Simplifies customer billing and cash collection.

module_sme_rollup.name: Visibility & Reporting
module_sme_rollup.description: Deliver real-time dashboards and customizable reports to stakeholders at all levels.

statements.text: Display project status with RAG indicators, milestone completion, and real-time progress visibility.
statements.rationale: Provides executive overview of portfolio health.

statements.text: Compare budgeted costs to actual spend with variance analysis and display on dashboard.
statements.rationale: Tracks financial performance against plan.

statements.text: Navigate from portfolio summary to individual project and task detail with drill-down capability.
statements.rationale: Enables investigation of issues at appropriate detail level.

statements.text: Build custom reports with configurable filters, grouping, and field selection; export to PDF or CSV.
statements.rationale: Supports diverse stakeholder reporting needs.

statements.text: Deliver scheduled reports automatically via email to stakeholders on defined cadence.
statements.rationale: Reduces manual reporting effort and ensures timely communication.

statements.text: Provide customer portal showing project progress, milestones, deliverables, and approval status.
statements.rationale: Improves client transparency and reduces status inquiry overhead.

module_sme_rollup.name: Platform & Governance
module_sme_rollup.description: Ensure secure access, data integrity, system integration, and regulatory compliance.

statements.text: Create individual user accounts with role-based access control; restrict visibility by project and role.
statements.rationale: Protects sensitive project data and enforces least-privilege access.

statements.text: Support single sign-on and two-factor authentication; maintain audit logs of logins and system actions.
statements.rationale: Strengthens security and enables compliance auditing.

statements.text: Encrypt data at rest and in transit; maintain audit trail of all user actions with timestamp and identity.
statements.rationale: Meets PSG Cyber Essentials and data protection requirements.

statements.text: Implement automated data retention policies with scheduled deletion; maintain backup and disaster recovery.
statements.rationale: Ensures business continuity and regulatory compliance.

statements.text: Import and export projects, tasks, and data via CSV, Excel, or PDF; provide REST API for integrations.
statements.rationale: Enables data portability and third-party system connectivity.

statements.text: Synchronize financial data with accounting software and project schedules with calendar systems.
statements.rationale: Eliminates manual data entry and maintains system-of-record alignment.

statements.text: Accessible via web browser on phones, tablets, and desktops with responsive UI and push notifications.
statements.rationale: Enables team access from any device and location.

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your project data is accessible, secure, and connected to your other business systems. Singapore SMEs must comply with PDPA regulations and protect client information, while your team needs to access projects from the office, site, or home on any device. Without this foundation, you risk data breaches, compliance violations, and siloed information that slows decision-making.

Project Core.narrative: This family gives you the core tools to plan, assign, and track work—from breaking down a project into tasks to reminding the team of deadlines and keeping documents in one place. For a Singapore SME juggling multiple clients or internal projects, this prevents tasks from falling through the cracks and keeps everyone aligned on what's due and who's responsible. A construction firm using templates to standardise site setup, or a consulting firm tracking deliverables for each client engagement, both rely on this daily.

Time & Resources.narrative: This family tracks who is working on what and how much it costs, so you know if your team is overloaded, underutilised, or spending more than budgeted. For a Singapore SME billing clients by the hour or managing tight project margins, accurate time and expense capture directly affects invoicing accuracy and profitability. A design agency tracking billable hours per client, or a maintenance contractor logging travel expenses, both need this to stay profitable.

Financial Control.narrative: This family links project spending to budgets and turns project data into client invoices, so you know if a project is making or losing money before it ends. Singapore SMEs operating on fixed-price or time-and-materials contracts depend on this to avoid cost overruns and ensure timely, accurate billing. A software development firm invoicing on milestones, or a consulting firm billing by the hour with expense reimbursement, both need visibility into project profitability.

Delivery & Tracking.narrative: This family gives you a visual timeline of your project, alerts you to risks and delays, and lets customers see progress and approve work without constant emails. For a Singapore SME managing client expectations and delivering on time, a Gantt chart and risk register help you spot problems early, while a customer portal reduces back-and-forth and builds confidence. A renovation contractor showing clients progress photos and timelines, or a software vendor getting sign-off on milestones, both benefit from this transparency.

Analytics & Reporting.narrative: This family turns project data into dashboards and reports so you and your leadership can see at a glance which projects are on track, which are at risk, and how the team is performing. For a Singapore SME with multiple projects or ambitions to grow, regular visibility into project health and team utilisation helps you make faster, smarter decisions about resource allocation and pricing. A project manager reviewing weekly status for the board, or a director spotting which project types are most profitable, both rely on this.
